settingsMenuPasswordInfo: Your master password encrypts all your data locally.

settingsMenuTutorialInfo: Replay the guided tour. This creates a fresh Tutorial chat and walks you through the basics again.

settingsMenuRestoreAcknowledgeLabel: I understand this will overwrite all current data
settingsMenuStoragePersistenceOn: On: the browser will not evict your messages and keys to reclaim disk space.
settingsMenuStoragePersistenceOff: Off: the browser may clear your messages and keys when the device runs low on storage.
settingsMenuStoragePersistenceRemovalNot: Once enabled, the only way to turn persistent storage off is to clear this site's data in your browser settings, which also deletes your messages and keys. Revoking the browser permission on its own does not remove it.
settingsMenuStorageBackupDescription: Create an encrypted backup of your entire account and all chats, or restore from a previous backup. Backups are encrypted with your master password.
settingsMenuStorageExportDescription: Export chats as .txt. Exported files are not encrypted.

exportChatsEmpty: You have no chats to export yet.
settingsMenuStorageDeleteDescription: Permanently delete all your data including account, conversations, and messages. This action cannot be undone.
settingsMenuDeleteWarningWithProfile: You will lose access to all your encrypted messages permanently.
settingsMenuDeleteWarningWithoutProfile: All stored data will be permanently removed.
settingsMenuDeleteConfirmTitle: Enter your master password to confirm
settingsMenuDeleteConfirmDescription: This is your final confirmation. All data will be permanently deleted.
settingsMenuStatsNoReactions: No reactions yet. Break the ice with a message!
settingsMenuStatsNoMessages: No incoming messages yet. Time to start a conversation.
settingsMenuSecurityAutoLockWarningInsec: Manual lock keeps your account unlocked across tab and browser restarts, which is not recommended on shared or compromised devices.
settingsMenuSecurityHideHomepageDescript: Replace chat previews with "Tap to view messages". Needs a refresh.
settingsMenuSecurityInstantLockDescripti: A quicker way to lock the app instantly.
settingsMenuSecurityManualLockDescriptio: Lock your account immediately to protect your data.
settingsMenuSecurityInfoItem1: Your master password is never stored or transmitted
settingsMenuSecurityInfoItem2: All account data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM
settingsMenuSecurityInfoItem4: Data is encrypted locally in your browser
settingsMenuAboutIntro: A private, open-source messenger with no servers and no accounts. Your messages are encrypted end-to-end with a key only you and your contact hold; nothing is stored in the cloud, and no one else can read your conversations.
settingsMenuAboutSelfHost: To run your own instance, see the
settingsMenuAboutOfflineFile: You can also download the app as a
desktopNoChatMessage: Choose a conversation from the sidebar to start messaging
chatSetupDescription: Create a secure chat with end-to-end encryption
chatSetupGenerateDescription: Choose this option to start a chat
chatSetupManualDescription: Choose this option to join someone's chat
chatSetupCopyTooltip: Copy the backup phrase without revealing it
chatSetupWarning: For maximum security, write this phrase down on paper and share it offline with your contact. NOTE: You will not see this phrase again, so if you lose it, you will have to create it again.
profileSetupErrorRequirements: Please meet all password requirements shown above
profileSetupErrorCreateFailed: Failed to create account. Please try again.
profileSetupSubtitle: Set up your account with a strong password to encrypt your data locally in your browser.
profileSetupPasswordHelp: Your master password encrypts all your data. Choose something strong and memorable.
weakPasswordBody: This password isn't very secure. It protects everything stored on your device, so a stronger one is safer.
profileSetupPrivacyItem1: Your master password is never stored
profileSetupPrivacyItem2: All account data is encrypted at rest
profileSetupPrivacyItem3: Only you can access your information
unlockErrorGeneric: Failed to unlock account. Please try again.
unlockSubtitle: Enter your master password to access your chats.
profileBootstrapEyebrow: Private messaging that rides on the apps you already use
profileBootstrapHeroTagline: Turn your messages into encrypted code, then send and receive through your favourite messaging apps, email, or SMS.
profileBootstrapRequiredNote: Setup is required before you can continue.
profileBootstrapFeaturesSubtitle: Nothing sits between you and the person you're talking to. Everything stays local.
profileBootstrapFeature1Description: Paste the code wherever you already chat to add an extra layer of protection.
profileBootstrapFeature2Description: Nothing identifies you, so there is nothing to leak and nothing for a company to hand over.
profileBootstrapFeature3Description: Send private messages and make peer-to-peer voice and video calls, with no server sitting between you and your contact.
profileBootstrapWorkflowSubtitle: Your message turns into a scrambled code that only you and your contact can read.
profileBootstrapWorkflowExampleMessage: Hey, are we still on for Friday?
profileBootstrapWorkflowStep1Description: Your key is a 12-word phrase. Share it with your friend, preferably in person.
profileBootstrapWorkflowStep2Description: Sending a message automatically encrypts and copies it to your clipboard. Ready for you to paste anywhere.
profileBootstrapWorkflowStep3Description: Your contact pastes your code into their chat which decrypts it automatically. For their eyes only.
profileBootstrapAssuranceDescription: You don't have to take our word for it. The app runs entirely in your browser, the code is open, and the encryption is a published standard you can check.
profileBootstrapPillar1Description: This app is open-source and licensed under GNU AGPL v3.
profileBootstrapPillar2Description: Messages use AES-GCM encryption with keys generated and held only on your device.
profileBootstrapPillar3Description: Backups are password-protected and portable, so you keep access to your conversations without anything stored on a server.
profileBootstrapTipsTitle: Top tips while using this site
profileBootstrapTipsItem1: Back up as often as you can. With no server, lost messages can't be recovered.
profileBootstrapTipsItem2: For best security and privacy, only connect with people you know and trust.
profileBootstrapTipsItem3: There's no password reset. Choose a master password you'll remember.
profileBootstrapTipsItem4: Anyone on your unlocked device can read your chats, so lock the app when you step away.
profileBootstrapCtaDescription: Create a local account or restore an existing one to pick up right where you left off.
restoreProfileSubtitle: Import an encrypted backup to restore your account and all chats.

sessionUnlockSubtitle: Enter your master password to decrypt messages and continue chatting.
chatInterfaceBannerSubtitle: Enter your master password to view encrypted messages
chatInterfacePendingEncryption: Encrypting and uploading to your contact.
chatInterfacePendingLocal: This media stays local until you press send.
chatInterfaceDeleteBody: This will permanently delete your chat with {name} and all messages.
autoDeleteLocalOnlyNote: Auto-delete only applies to your device. The other person will still see messages normally.
clearChatConfirmBody: This will permanently delete all messages in your chat with {name}. The chat and shared key will be kept.
chatInterfaceOfflineBody: This will disconnect your real-time connection with {name}.
chatInterfaceErrorClearChat: Failed to clear chat. Please try again.
chatInterfaceErrorMessageDelete: Failed to delete message. Please try again.
chatInterfaceErrorStartCallAudio: Failed to start call. Please check your microphone permissions and try again.
chatInterfaceErrorStartCallVideo: Failed to start call. Please check your camera and microphone permissions and try again.
chatInterfaceErrorInvite: Failed to create call invitation. Please try again.
chatInterfaceErrorAcceptCall: Failed to accept call. Please try again.
tutorialOfferBody: New here? Why not try the tutorial chat? It takes about a minute and you can delete it when you're done.
tutorialDeferredBody: You can start the tutorial anytime from Settings, under the Account section.
tutorialMsgIntro1: Hey, welcome to the tutorial. There is no server here, so your messages never leave your device unencrypted.
tutorialMsgIntro2: When you send a message without a live connection, it turns into a scrambled code. You copy that code and share it with your friend off this app, through WhatsApp, Telegram, email, etc. Only someone with this chat's key can read it.
tutorialMsgPromptSend: Let's try it. Type any message in the box below and send it.
tutorialMsgAfterSend1:
Nice work. Your message is now a scrambled code, sitting on your clipboard, ready to send. Instead of sending it off though, try pasting it right back here in the chat.

(If you're having trouble pasting, you can open the message's 3-dot menu and choose *Copy code*.)
tutorialSecretMessage: And there it is: that code decrypted straight back into your message. Only this chat's key can read it; to anyone else it is just scrambled noise.
tutorialMsgComplete: That is the whole app: no servers, no accounts anywhere but on your device, just you and your key. Nicely done.
tutorialMsgReactPrompt: Tap the *plus icon* on this message and pick an emoji to give it a try.
tutorialMsgReactionLaugh:
Ha, I knew there was a sense of humour in there. And yes, even your reactions are encrypted, just like everything else.

Bear in mind, for offline chatting, you can only react to your friend's most recent message.
tutorialMsgReactionHeart:
A heart? You are too kind. Your reactions ride along encrypted, just like the messages do.

Bear in mind, for offline chatting, you can only react to your friend's most recent message.
tutorialMsgReactionHundred:
A hundred out of a hundred, I will take it. Even reactions stay encrypted between us.

Bear in mind, for offline chatting, you can only react to your friend's most recent message.
tutorialMsgOnlinePrompt: So far we have passed codes back and forth, which works even when you are both offline. But we can also talk in real time. Tap *Go online* at the top to invite me to connect.
tutorialMsgOnlinePromptSend: To connect live I need your invite. It is already copied, so paste it into the box below and send it to me.
tutorialMsgOnlineResponse: Got your invite. Here is my response: copy it and paste it back into the message box to finish connecting.
tutorialMsgConnected: We are connected in real time now. From here messages, reactions and typing all flow live between us, still end to end encrypted.
tutorialMsgOnlineDisclosure: One thing worth knowing about what just happened. You connected to me, a stand-in running right here on your own device, so nothing actually left your machine. With a real friend it works the same way, except your browser first checks with two small public helper servers, called STUN servers (Cloudflare and Nextcloud), just to find a direct path between the two of you. That quick check is the only thing ever contacted, and it is what lets people connect directly with no server in the middle. Going online is completely optional, though. Chatting offline by passing codes, the way we started, is still the recommended option: it is the most private, and it reaches out to nothing at all.
tutorialMsgOnlineFailed: That connection did not go through. This can happen with a VPN, a strict firewall, or a browser privacy blocker getting in the way of the direct link. No worries: everything else works exactly the same, and you can try again anytime by starting a real chat.
tutorialMsgOnlineReply1: Got it, loud and clear over our live connection.
tutorialMsgOnlineReply2: Message received, in real time and fully encrypted.
tutorialMsgOnlineReply3: Nice one. This is all flowing peer to peer, with no server in the middle.
tutorialMsgOnlineReply4: Heard you. Even this reply is end to end encrypted.
tutorialMsgOptionsHint: Two more things worth trying on your own from the chat menu (the dots at the top): turn on *disappearing messages* so they auto-delete, or *import an existing chat history*.
tutorialMsgDeleteHint: I will stick around in case you want to revisit this. Whenever you are ready to remove me, tap my name at the top to open the chat details, then choose *Delete Chat*.
tutorialMsgAddFriend: Ready to start your first real chat? Tap the *blue plus icon*, give the chat a name, and choose *Generate New Key*. That creates your secret key. Share it with your friend any way you like, then have them tap the *plus icon*, choose *Enter Existing Key*, and paste it in. Once you both hold the same key, every message between you is end to end encrypted, just like ours.

Try generating a new connection code.
messageBubbleShareUnavailable: Cannot share message: secure storage not available.
messageBubbleShareError: Failed to copy message code. Please try again.
errorMessageTooLongForLink: This message is too long to send as a code. Shorten it by about {count} characters, or connect directly to send it instantly.
messageBubbleDeleteForEveryoneOffline: Delete for everyone is only available when both users are online.
messageBubbleDeleteForEveryoneUnsynced: This message cannot be deleted for everyone because it is not synced online yet.
messageBubbleConfirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this message? This action cannot be undone.
messageBubbleConfirmDeleteEveryone: Delete this message for everyone? This will remove it for both participants and cannot be undone.
messageBubbleErrorDeleteMessage: Failed to delete message. Please try again.
messageBubbleErrorDeleteEveryoneConnecti: Failed to delete the message for everyone. Please check your connection and try again.
messageBubbleErrorDeleteEveryone: Failed to delete message for everyone. Please try again.
contactInfoDangerDescription: Permanently delete this chat and all its messages.
contactInfoDeleteChatBody: This will permanently delete your chat with {name} and all messages.
contactInfoErrorUpdateName: Failed to update contact name. Please try again.
regenKeyWarningBody: Use this if your key may be compromised. All existing messages will be re-encrypted with the new key. Share the new key with your contact; they must update their key to continue the conversation.
regenKeySuccess: Chat key updated. Share the new key with your contact.
regenKeyError: Failed to update chat key. Please try again.
connectionPanelSenderInstruction: Code copied to clipboard. Send it to {name}, then paste their reply below.
connectionPanelSenderInstructionUncopied: Copy the code to your clipboard. Send it to {name}, then paste their reply below.
connectionPanelReceiverInstruction: Code copied to clipboard. Send it back to {name}.
connectionPanelReceiverInstructionUncopi: Copy the code to your clipboard. Send it back to {name}.
connectionPanelFailedIntro: A direct peer-to-peer connection couldn't be established. Common causes:
connectionPanelFailedBrowser: Browser privacy settings: privacy-focused browsers (Brave, Zen, strict Firefox) can block WebRTC. Try Chrome or a standard Firefox profile.
connectionPanelFailedVpn: VPN or proxy: if either person is on a VPN, try disconnecting it and connecting again.
connectionPanelFailedFirewall: Strict firewall: corporate or institutional networks can block WebRTC. Try a different network, such as a mobile hotspot.
connectionPanelFailedNat: Double NAT: some routers or ISP setups prevent peers from finding each other.
offlineCallDialogBody: You need to be online to call {name}. Use the connect button to establish a connection first.
settingsProfileContactsDescription: Share any or all of your profile with someone so they know how to reach you. Totally optional.
profileShareNothingToShare: You have no contact details to share yet. Open Settings, go to Account, then Edit Profile to add some.
a11yMessageLocked: Encrypted message. Unlock your session to read it.
footerLicense: Available as open source under the terms of the GNU AGPL v3 License.
pageSendMessageFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
profileShareChooseContactDescription: Select which contact you'd like to share your profile with:
profileShareCodeDescription: Share this code with {name} to send your contact information securely:
profileShareErrorCreateFailed: Failed to create profile share code
profileShareNoContactsHint: Create a chat first to share your profile
profileShareSelectionDescription: Choose what information you'd like to share with {name}:
connectionNoticeTrust: This app cannot verify who is on the other end of a connection. Only go online with someone if you shared your encryption key with them directly and trust them completely.
connectionNoticeIp: Going online connects your devices directly. That exposes your IP address (roughly, your location and internet provider) to the person you connect with, and theirs to you.
